identified_preflight_defect.reason: P52 expresses primary_test_target_start_interval with an inclusive upper endpoint, whereas PRIMARY_TEST_TARGET_STOP is an internal exclusive Python stop index equal to 52105.

evaluator_v2_static_hold.impact_assessment: Evaluator v2 stopped during read-only protocol reconciliation before HDF/NPZ payload access, checkpoint deserialization, model construction, or inference.

evaluator_v3_supersession.invariance_statement: No data asset, raw traffic value, mask, checkpoint, model configuration, seed, scenario, split, normalization statistic, metric, output directory, P52 protocol, P58 addendum, or P60 addendum was changed.

single_change.reason: The corrected expression compares P52's inclusive target-start interval [41692, 52104] against the internal exclusive stop representation PRIMARY_TEST_TARGET_STOP - 1.

frozen_protocol_references.immutability_statement: P52, P58, and P60 remain unchanged.

next_required_step: Perform a read-only static audit of evaluator v3 before any runtime preflight or final primary-test inference.
portability_note: Paths rewritten project-root-relative from the frozen original in configs/frozen/.
